topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: When Firefly categories are missing or ambiguous, forecast monthly Income/Fixed/Variable decomposition uses AI-assisted bucket assignment (merchant, description, category fusion) so operators see real spending patterns—not silent zeros or hardcoded map gaps.

backend forecast project.rs categorize_delta and map_category chain; new AI bucket inference module; GET /api/v1/forecast/monthly response fields; React ForecastPage Monthly tab stat cards; US-0006 PrivacyLayer and audit patterns; Firefly mirror category_id and recurring patterns post-BUG-0006.

BUG-0012 DONE (Q0014)—DEC-0007 config map is prerequisite baseline; AI extends never replaces config path; US-0006 allow_raw_transactions=false default; BUG-0007 DONE—coordinate shared category intelligence only; US-0013 ML overlay separate; no Firefly write-back; no host secrets.

Eight acceptance rows AC-0 prerequisite through AC-7; cargo forecast projection tests with ambiguous-category fixtures; API asserts bucket_source or ai_mapped metadata; UI Monthly tab badge smoke; OIDC pass-with-prerequisites BACKEND_FRONTEND_DEPLOY; privacy regression under default TOML.

Operator confirms ambiguous mirror rows receive plausible income/fixed/variable buckets with visible AI-mapped indicator; BUG-0012 AG/AH prerequisite checked; all US-0015 acceptance rows checked; user guide US-0015 stub at architecture when USER_GUIDE_MODE=1.

decomposition.rationale: Four workflow surfaces (AI inference, projection integration, monthly API/UI badge, audit trail) share forecast projection but BUG-0012 released config baseline; retain US-0015 epic identity; recommend 3 vertical slices at sprint-plan.

recommended_slices.title: AI bucket inference service
recommended_slices.boundary: Merchant/description/category fusion; confidence scoring; privacy-safe feature extraction under DEC-0032 defaults

recommended_slices.title: Projection integration
recommended_slices.boundary: Fallback chain DEC-0007 config map then AI proposal; recurring pattern labels; no silent Variable-only absorption

recommended_slices.title: Operator visibility + audit
recommended_slices.boundary: Monthly API bucket_source fields; UI AI-mapped badge/tooltip; audit log; user guide; OIDC smoke

alternatives_considered: Split into US-0017..0019 backlog stories now — rejected (operator epic continuity from BUG-0012 deferral; sprint-plan owns slice IDs)
Merge into BUG-0007 — rejected (chat discovery vs forecast projection surface)
RAG embedding index — rejected for MVP (R-0060; rule+LLM cascade sufficient per R-0074)
